pi_items.source: task.json metadata; name specified in task description; user must create this style
setup_geoserver.sh line 186: publish_layer 'ne_populated_places'; GeoServer REST API configuration shows layer published in 'ne' workspace

Natural Earth populated places documentation; pop_max is documented as the metropolitan area population attribute used for sizing town labels; verified in Natural Earth dataset schema from https://www.naturalearthdata.com/downloads/10m-cultural-vectors/10m-populated-places/
GeoServer SLD documentation (https://docs.geoserver.org/main/en/user/styling/sld/reference/labeling.html) specifies VendorOption spaceAround as valid parameter for label spacing conflict resolution
GeoServer 2.25.x documentation (https://docs.geoserver.org/2.25.x/en/user/styling/sld/reference/textsymbolizer.html) confirms Arial font is supported as CssParameter font-family value
GeoServer SLD documentation (https://docs.geoserver.org/main/en/user/styling/sld/reference/textsymbolizer.html) specifies font-weight CSS parameter supports 'bold' value
GeoServer 2.25.x documentation (https://docs.geoserver.org/2.25.x/en/user/styling/sld/reference/textsymbolizer.html) confirms font-size parameter supports numeric pixel values

privileged_info_summary: Task requires creating an SLD style named 'city_labels_priority' for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer in GeoServer 2.25.2. The layer uses Natural Earth 1:110m populated places data, a real public dataset with a 'pop_max' attribute representing metropolitan population. The style must configure a red circle point symbolizer (size 6), a text label using the 'name' attribute in Arial Bold 12px font, label priority based on the 'pop_max' attribute, and a spaceAround VendorOption value of 15 for label conflict resolution. All styling parameters and data attributes specified in the metadata are valid and correctly documented in GeoServer 2.25.x SLD specifications and Natural Earth data schema.
